creator: kalten@gmx.at
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #5)
> Committed.
Thank you.


> Do you want to take over MAINTAINER for this port?
Uh—as I am too lazy regarding the ports I already am maintainer of, it
does not sound wise :-( on the other hand: this port does not have a
maintainer at the moment, and there seem to be hardly ever changes to
the program code. Further more: if I should not be able to maintain the
port properly in future cases, the requests would fall back to others
anyway; if you want to bother to set me as the maintainer—please do.

Regards,
 Kalten
